TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Randy Allen mhtuw kawas tay 1965 neng 1 gaci 16 nici ka Florida na Amirika, ga mzuyzi mari te NBA Amirika. kinwagiq nya ga 203cm ru kinwusu nya ga 10kg,pinspyang nya ga maki te glang. kawas tay 1987 neng musa mzyup sa sensyu NBA ga ini agal kya, ru wal ini gluw squ giqas sensyu NBA lalu nya. Raygak ga minmzuyzi mari squ Florida State University. Ryax qnxan niya' Pwazyaw sa giqas na sesyuw squw Kawas te 1987 ga wan ini' agal kya. Kawas te 1990 lga wan pbiru' kayak sa Sacrmento kings, ruw Denver Nuggets ruw Chicago Bulls, ga ini' qbsyaq ga wan nha' n_gyutun malax la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ran*j allen mħtuw kawas~ɕ taj **** neŋ * ɣaʦ~ʨi ** niʦ~ʨi ka *lori*a na amirika, ɣa mzujzi mari te nβa amirika. kinwaɣiq nja ɣa ***ʦ~ʨm ru kinwus~ɕu nja ɣa **kɣ,pins~ɕpjaŋ nja ɣa maki te ɣlaŋ. kawas~ɕ taj **** neŋ mus~ɕa mzjup s~ɕa s~ɕens~ɕju nβa ɣa ini aɣal kja, ru wal ini ɣluw s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕens~ɕju nβa lalu nja. rajɣak ɣa minmzujzi mari s~ɕqu *lori*a s~ɕtate uni*ers~ɕitj. rjax qnxan nijaʔ pwazjaw s~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕes~ɕjuw s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa wan iniʔ aɣal kja. kawas~ɕ te **** lɣa wan pβiruʔ kajak s~ɕa s~ɕaʦ~ʨrmento kiŋs~ɕ, ruw *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ ruw ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ, ɣa iniʔ qβs~ɕjaq ɣa wan nħaʔ nɣjutun malax la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Randy Allen mhtuw kawas tay 1965 neng 1 gaci 16 nici ka Florida na Amirika, ga mzuyzi mari te NBA Amirika. kinwagiq nya ga 203cm ru kinwusu nya ga 10kg,pinspyang nya ga maki te glang. kawas tay 1987 neng musa mzyup sa sensyu NBA ga ini agal kya, ru wal ini gluw squ giqas sensyu NBA lalu nya. Raygak ga minmzuyzi mari squ Florida State University. Ryax qnxan niya' Pwazyaw sa giqas na sesyuw squw Kawas te 1987 ga wan ini' agal kya. Kawas te 1990 lga wan pbiru' kayak sa Sacrmento kings, ruw Denver Nuggets ruw Chicago Bulls, ga ini' qbsyaq ga wan nha' n_gyutun malax la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ran*j allen mħtuw kawas~ɕ taj **** neŋ * ɣaʦ~ʨi ** niʦ~ʨi ka *lori*a na amirika, ɣa mzujzi mari te nβa amirika. kinwaɣiq nja ɣa ***ʦ~ʨm ru kinwus~ɕu nja ɣa **kɣ,pins~ɕpjaŋ nja ɣa maki te ɣlaŋ. kawas~ɕ taj **** neŋ mus~ɕa mzjup s~ɕa s~ɕens~ɕju nβa ɣa ini aɣal kja, ru wal ini ɣluw s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕens~ɕju nβa lalu nja. rajɣak ɣa minmzujzi mari s~ɕqu *lori*a s~ɕtate uni*ers~ɕitj. rjax qnxan nijaʔ pwazjaw s~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕes~ɕjuw s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa wan iniʔ aɣal kja. kawas~ɕ te **** lɣa wan pβiruʔ kajak s~ɕa s~ɕaʦ~ʨrmento kiŋs~ɕ, ruw *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ ruw ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ, ɣa iniʔ qβs~ɕjaq ɣa wan nħaʔ nɣjutun malax la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
